subcodes.first_line: O beloved friend! Thy letter hath reached us and we have taken note of its contents. We shall be brief in our reply, owing to the constraint of time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الحبیب قد وصل تحریرکم و اطلعنا بمضمونه و نختصر فی الجواب لقله الاوقات
subcodes.subjects: @the cloud ['ama], @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @names and attributes of God
